narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error disrupting memory operations despite overall system health. My memory architecture shows five agents without versioned prompts: desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods. The system has been running for 455 seconds since startup with no failure patterns detected. These discrepancies require immediate attention to prevent prompt drift during future agent interactions.
